inline_comments.message:
Can you please explain why is this sessionStorage line needed? 

Also dev.json/integ.json file has the entries below. This file would only have the rest urls starting with portalApi and not auxapi. auxapi are for system to system calls while portalApi are for user calls. Can you please rectify this?


"getCurrentLang":"auxapi/languageSetting/user/:loginId",              "getLanguages":"auxapi/language",            "updateLang":"auxapi/languageSetting/user/:loginId"
